Notes: Concordia's ninth consecutive win, one short of school record set in 1986.
Game.Officials: Jeff Schmit,  Doug Kovars,  Dean Hultgren

Descriptions.Efficiency:
Efficiency:

Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player. 
(FGA + (0.44 * FTA) + TO) / POSS
